parameters.query:
WITH requested_batch AS (
    SELECT {{ Number.isInteger($json.batch_id) ? $json.batch_id : 'null' }}::bigint AS batch_id
),
resolved_batch AS (
    SELECT
        COALESCE(rb.batch_id, (SELECT MAX(id) FROM public.signup_batches)) AS batch_id,
        rb.batch_id AS requested_batch_id,
        CASE
            WHEN rb.batch_id IS NOT NULL
             AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM public.signup_batches b WHERE b.id = rb.batch_id)
            THEN format('Batch %s does not exist', rb.batch_id)
            ELSE NULL
        END AS error_message
    FROM requested_batch rb
),
best_contact AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT ON (CONCAT(rc."First name", ' ', rc."Last name"))
        CONCAT(rc."First name", ' ', rc."Last name") AS payer_name,
        rc."Address 1",
        rc."Address 2",
        rc.town,
        rc.postcode
    FROM public.raw_contacts rc
    ORDER BY CONCAT(rc."First name", ' ', rc."Last name"),
             CASE WHEN COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(rc."Address 1"), ''), NULLIF(TRIM(rc.postcode), '')) IS NOT NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
             CASE WHEN NULLIF(TRIM(rc."Address 1"), '') IS NOT NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
             CASE WHEN NULLIF(TRIM(rc.postcode), '') IS NOT NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END
),
processed_signups_base AS (
    SELECT
        b.id AS batch_id,
        s.signup_date,
        s.member,
        s.payer,
        s.product,
        b.status AS batch_status,
        bc."Address 1",
        bc."Address 2",
        bc.town,
        bc.postcode,
        CASE WHEN s.product = '6. Parent 2026' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_parent_2026,
        CASE WHEN s.product NOT IN ('6. Parent 2026', 'b. Pavilion Key', 'a. Social 2026') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_other_product,
        CASE WHEN s.product = 'b. Pavilion Key' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_key,
        rb.error_message
    FROM resolved_batch AS rb
    INNER JOIN public.signup_batches AS b
        ON b.id = rb.batch_id
    INNER JOIN public.member_signups AS s
        ON b.id = s.batch_id
    LEFT JOIN best_contact AS bc
        ON s.payer = bc.payer_name
    WHERE rb.error_message IS NULL
),
consolidated AS (
    SELECT
        MIN(batch_id) AS batch_id,
        COUNT(DISTINCT batch_id) AS batch_count,
        payer,
        "Address 1",
        "Address 2",
        town,
        postcode,
        SUM(is_parent_2026) AS parent_tags,
        SUM(is_other_product) AS regular_tags,
        SUM(is_key) AS key_tags,
        COUNT(*) AS total_items,
        NULL::text AS error_message
    FROM processed_signups_base
    WHERE product <> 'a. Social 2026'
    GROUP BY payer, "Address 1", "Address 2", town, postcode
),
error_row AS (
    SELECT
        requested_batch_id AS batch_id,
        0::bigint AS batch_count,
        NULL::text AS payer,
        NULL::text AS "Address 1",
        NULL::text AS "Address 2",
        NULL::text AS town,
        NULL::text AS postcode,
        0::bigint AS parent_tags,
        0::bigint AS regular_tags,
        0::bigint AS key_tags,
        0::bigint AS total_items,
        error_message
    FROM resolved_batch
    WHERE error_message IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT
    batch_id,
    batch_count,
    payer,
    "Address 1",
    "Address 2",
    town,
    postcode,
    parent_tags,
    regular_tags,
    key_tags,
    total_items,
    error_message
FROM consolidated
UNION ALL
SELECT
    batch_id,
    batch_count,
    payer,
    "Address 1",
    "Address 2",
    town,
    postcode,
    parent_tags,
    regular_tags,
    key_tags,
    total_items,
    error_message
FROM error_row
ORDER BY payer NULLS FIRST, "Address 1", "Address 2", town, postcode;
